summary: VOD/SVOD | Hearing Playback Time Announcement After Pressing Play Following Fast Forward
description:
GIVEN the user is watching VOD/SVOD content
AND TTS is enabled
AND the user has initiated Fast Forward

steps.action: WHEN the user presses select during Fast Forward
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “Play/pause, <current_time> of <total_time>, press select to play/pause”
